reviews.comment:
Un paraíso para el Socio del ACA. Excelente y esmerada atención de los playeros asistiendo en forma personal para el pago a través de la aplicación de YPF, muy buena la limpieza de vidrios. Surtidor especial sin tener que hacer cola de espera. MUY RECOMENDABLE.

(Translated by Google)
A paradise for ACA members. Excellent and attentive service from beach attendants, personally assisting with payment through the YPF app, and excellent window cleaning. Special pump with no waiting in line. HIGHLY RECOMMENDED.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKemRpeWFREAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente!! Siempre bien atendida, siempre funciona el app de YPF sin problemas al contrario de las otras sucursales

(Translated by Google)
Excellent!! Always great service, the YPF app always works perfectly, unlike at other branches.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, 3 estrellas por no tener Nafta Súper. Aplican descuento a Socios del ACA.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, 3 stars for not having Super Gasoline. Discounts apply to ACA members.

reviews.comment:
